subject: [PATCH v2 10/21] nfsd: fix FL_SLEEP being set unconditionally for all LOCK types

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where the FL_SLEEP flag was being set unconditionally for all lock types, including non-blocking ones. The fix replaces the bitmask test with explicit equality checks to ensure that FL_SLEEP is only set when necessary. This addresses an issue introduced by a previous commit and improves the accuracy of lock notifications.
